requirement_topic.en: Labelling Requirements — Georgian Language and GeoSTM Conformity Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 标签要求——格鲁吉亚语及GeoSTM合格标志
requirement_topic.zht: 標籤要求——格魯吉亞語及GeoSTM合格標誌

summary.en: Products placed on the Georgian market, including respiratory PPE, must bear labelling in the Georgian language. Key labelling content for respiratory PPE typically includes: product name and category (in Georgian); manufacturer name and address; applicable standard designation (GeoSTM/GOST reference); filtration class or performance level (e.g., equivalent to FFP1/FFP2 or GOST class); use-by date or shelf life; usage instructions and warnings (in Georgian); and the Georgian national conformity mark (where applicable under GeoSTM certification). Georgia does NOT use the EAEU EAC mark or the EU CE mark as the required conformity symbol for domestically sold products. The Georgian conformity marking scheme is administered by GeoSTM. Note: Georgia's DCFTA-driven technical approximation means labelling rules may evolve over time as further harmonisation with EU norms progresses.
summary.zh: 投放格鲁吉亚市场的产品（包括呼吸防护PPE）须以格鲁吉亚语标注标签。呼吸防护PPE的关键标签内容通常包括：产品名称及类别（格鲁吉亚语）；制造商名称及地址；适用标准编号（GeoSTM/GOST参考）；过滤等级或性能级别（如相当于FFP1/FFP2或GOST类别）；有效期或保质期；使用说明及警告（格鲁吉亚语）；以及格鲁吉亚国家合格标志（适用GeoSTM认证时）。格鲁吉亚不将欧亚经济联盟EAC标志或欧盟CE标志作为国内销售产品所需的合格标志。格鲁吉亚合格标志制度由GeoSTM管理。注：格鲁吉亚在深化全面自由贸易区协议推动下的技术靠拢意味着，随着与欧盟规范进一步协调推进，标签规则可能随时间演变。
summary.zht: 投放格魯吉亞市場的產品（包括呼吸防護PPE）須以格魯吉亞語標注標籤。呼吸防護PPE的關鍵標籤內容通常包括：產品名稱及類別（格魯吉亞語）；製造商名稱及地址；適用標準編號（GeoSTM/GOST參考）；過濾等級或性能級別（如相當於FFP1/FFP2或GOST類別）；有效期或保質期；使用說明及警告（格魯吉亞語）；以及格魯吉亞國家合格標誌（適用GeoSTM認證時）。格魯吉亞不將歐亞經濟聯盟EAC標誌或歐盟CE標誌作為國內銷售產品所需的合格標誌。格魯吉亞合格標誌制度由GeoSTM管理。注：格魯吉亞在深化全面自由貿易區協議推動下的技術靠攏意味著，隨著與歐盟規範進一步協調推進，標籤規則可能隨時間演變。

standards_or_laws: GeoSTM Georgian national labelling requirements for PPE — Georgian language mandatory
GOST 12.4.294 / GOST 12.4.296 — marking provisions within applicable GOST respiratory protection standards
EU-Georgia DCFTA — basis for progressive technical approximation including labelling norms

summary.en: Chinese GB 2626-2019 (KN95) and GB 19083 respirators require Chinese-language labelling on the product and/or packaging, including: product name; standard number (GB 2626-2019 or GB 19083-2010); filtration level (KN90/KN95); manufacturer name and address; production date and shelf life; instructions for use; and the CCC certification mark (for GB 2626 products under compulsory certification). Chinese-language-only labelling does not satisfy Georgian market requirements.
summary.zh: 中国GB 2626-2019（KN95）及GB 19083呼吸器须在产品及/或包装上以中文标注标签，内容包括：产品名称；标准编号（GB 2626-2019或GB 19083-2010）；过滤等级（KN90/KN95）；制造商名称及地址；生产日期及保质期；使用说明；以及CCC认证标志（适用强制认证的GB 2626产品）。仅有中文标签不满足格鲁吉亚市场要求。
summary.zht: 中國GB 2626-2019（KN95）及GB 19083呼吸器須在產品及/或包裝上以中文標注標籤，內容包括：產品名稱；標準編號（GB 2626-2019或GB 19083-2010）；過濾等級（KN90/KN95）；製造商名稱及地址；生產日期及保質期；使用說明；以及CCC認證標誌（適用強制認證的GB 2626產品）。僅有中文標籤不滿足格魯吉亞市場要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 — marking and labelling requirements (Section 9), CCC mark required
GB 19083-2010 — labelling requirements for medical protective masks

gap.en: Georgian-language labelling is required — Chinese-only labelling does not comply. Specific gaps: (1) All required label fields (product name, standard, class, instructions, warnings) must appear in Georgian script; (2) The applicable standard reference must cite the Georgian/GOST standard designation, not solely GB 2626; (3) The Georgian national conformity mark (GeoSTM scheme) must appear where required — CE mark and EAC mark are not the correct marks for Georgian domestic sale; (4) Labelling rules may update as Georgia's DCFTA approximation progresses — verify current requirements before final label design; (5) Importers / Georgian distributors typically take responsibility for ensuring local-language label compliance.
gap.zh: 须使用格鲁吉亚语标签——仅中文标签不合规。具体差距：（1）所有必要标签字段（产品名称、标准、等级、说明、警告）须以格鲁吉亚文字呈现；（2）适用标准引用须标注格鲁吉亚/GOST标准编号，而非仅引用GB 2626；（3）须按要求印有格鲁吉亚国家合格标志（GeoSTM制度）——CE标志和EAC标志不是格鲁吉亚国内销售的正确标志；（4）随着格鲁吉亚深化全面自由贸易区协议靠拢进程推进，标签规则可能更新——在最终标签设计前须核实现行要求；（5）进口商/格鲁吉亚经销商通常负责确保本地语言标签合规。
gap.zht: 須使用格魯吉亞語標籤——僅中文標籤不合規。具體差距：（1）所有必要標籤字段（產品名稱、標準、等級、說明、警告）須以格魯吉亞文字呈現；（2）適用標準引用須標注格魯吉亞/GOST標準編號，而非僅引用GB 2626；（3）須按要求印有格魯吉亞國家合格標誌（GeoSTM制度）——CE標誌和EAC標誌不是格魯吉亞國內銷售的正確標誌；（4）隨著格魯吉亞深化全面自由貿易區協議靠攏進程推進，標籤規則可能更新——在最終標籤設計前須核實現行要求；（5）進口商/格魯吉亞經銷商通常負責確保本地語言標籤合規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Georgian-language labelling required; GeoSTM conformity mark required where applicable; CE and EAC marks are not the correct marks for Georgian domestic sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Chinese-language labelling and CCC mark required for GB 2626-2019 industrial respirators sold in China

source.publisher: GeoSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Georgian market requires Georgian-language labelling on all respiratory PPE. Chinese-only (Mandarin) labelling does not comply. The Georgian national conformity mark applies — CE and EAC are not substitutes. Engage a Georgian importer or regulatory advisor to confirm current label format, required Georgian script fields, and conformity mark placement before product launch.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚市场要求所有呼吸防护PPE使用格鲁吉亚语标签。仅有中文（普通话）标签不合规。须使用格鲁吉亚国家合格标志——CE及EAC标志不可替代。产品上市前须与格鲁吉亚进口商或法规顾问确认当前标签格式、所需格鲁吉亚文字字段及合格标志位置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 格魯吉亞市場要求所有呼吸防護PPE使用格魯吉亞語標籤。僅有中文（普通話）標籤不合規。須使用格魯吉亞國家合格標誌——CE及EAC標誌不可替代。產品上市前須與格魯吉亞進口商或法規顧問確認當前標籤格式、所需格魯吉亞文字字段及合格標誌位置。
